contents.value: **If** — Small Basic keyword.
**Then** — Small Basic keyword.
**Else** — Small Basic keyword.
**ElseIf** — Small Basic keyword.
**EndIf** — Small Basic keyword.
**TextWindow.WriteLine** — Built-in function/command in Small Basic.
**TextWindow.ReadLine** — Built-in function/command in Small Basic.
**TextWindow.Write** — Built-in function/command in Small Basic.
**TextWindow.Read** — Built-in function/command in Small Basic.
**GraphicsWindow.Show** — Built-in function/command in Small Basic.

**For...To...Next** loops a counter through a range.
```
For i = 1 To 10
  ...
Next
```
**While...Wend** or **While...EndWhile** repeats while true.
A **Sub** is a subroutine that does not return a value.
A **Function** returns a value to the caller.

**Dim** declares a variable.
```
Dim x As Integer
```
**Print** outputs text to the console or display.
**Input** reads user input from the console.
**GoTo** transfers control to a labeled line (use sparingly).
An **Array** stores multiple values under one variable name.
A **String** holds text data.
An **Integer** holds whole number values.
A **Boolean** holds True or False.

**Select Case** provides multi-way branching.
```
Select Case x
  Case 1: ...
  Case Else: ...
End Select
```
**Do...Loop** repeats with While or Until condition.

```sb
TextWindow
```
Provides text-based input and output operations for console-style programs, enabling reading user input from the keyboard and writing formatted text output to the screen.

```sb
GraphicsWindow
```
Provides a graphical drawing surface for creating shapes, images, and animations with mouse and keyboard interaction support for building visual Small Basic programs.

```sb
Math
```
Provides standard mathematical functions and constants including trigonometry, rounding, random number generation, and common numeric operations for calculations.

```sb
Clock
```
Provides access to system clock values including current date components, time components, and elapsed milliseconds for timing and date-based program logic.

```sb
Timer
```
Provides a repeating timer mechanism that raises tick events at a configurable interval, useful for animations, periodic updates, and time-based game logic.

```sb
Controls
```
Provides user interface controls such as buttons and text boxes that can be placed on the graphics window for building interactive programs with form-like input.

```sb
Shapes
```
Provides named shape objects on the graphics window that can be individually moved, rotated, animated, and hidden, enabling sprite-based graphics and simple game development.

```sb
Turtle
```
The Turtle provides Logo-like functionality to draw shapes by moving a turtle on the screen.

```sb
Text
```
Provides text manipulation operations.

```sb
File
```
Provides operations for working with files.

```sb
Program
```
Provides operations related to the running program.

```sb
Stack
```
Provides stack (LIFO) operations.

```sb
Sound
```
Provides operations for playing sounds.

```sb
Number
```
Numeric data type for integer and floating-point values.

```sb
Object
```
Collection of key-value pairs (properties and methods).

```sb
null
```
Represents the intentional absence of any value.

```sb
undefined
```
Represents an uninitialized or missing value.

```sb
print(value)
```
Output a value to the standard output stream.

```sb
length
```
Returns the number of elements in a collection or characters in a string.
